payload:
# re.kriate — Complete Seamstress Kria Sequencer

## Objective

Complete all missing kria features for the seamstress platform: extended pages (ratchet, alt-note, glide), direction modes, pattern storage, and mute fix. Success = all features from the spec work end-to-end with full test coverage.

## Spec Pipeline (speckit)

This project uses **speckit** for spec-driven development. All artifacts live in `specs/001-seamstress-kria-features/`:

| Artifact | Path | Purpose |
|----------|------|--... [truncated, 3769 chars total]
007-swing-shuffle spec complete: 4 user stories, 10 FRs, 5 SCs, all checklist items pass. Spec at specs/007-swing-shuffle/spec.md

007-swing-shuffle plan complete: 5 phases (track model, swing timing, params, pattern verify, composition verify), 3 files modified (track.lua, sequencer.lua, app.lua), 5 research decisions, constitution PASS. Plan at specs/007-swing-shuffle/plan.md
007-swing-shuffle tasks generated: 17 tasks across 7 phases (setup, foundational, US1-US4, polish), 4 swarm dispatch blocks, full FR/SC traceability. Path: specs/007-swing-shuffle/tasks.md

007-swing-shuffle: CLEAN. 0 CRITICAL, 1 MEDIUM (spec/plan inconsistency on mid-playback swing change timing — advisory), 4 LOW (edge case test gaps — advisory). 15/15 requirements covered, 17 tasks, all impl tasks have preceding test tasks (Principle III OK). Constitution: all 5 principles PASS. Advisory: implementer should align mid-playback behavior to plan approach (immediate read) and consider adding edge case tests for EC2/EC3 in T006.

All artifacts consistent. 17 tasks across 7 phases, 3 files to modify. No CRITICAL issues. Runtime tasks created (swing:T001-T017). Start with T001 test scaffold, then TDD through phases sequentially.
All 17 swing/shuffle tasks implemented. 18/18 swing tests pass, 592/0/0 full suite. Commits: bc46791 (params), cc6425c (track_clock), 7bf46f1 (tests). tasks.md needs checkbox updates for T007-T017.
007-swing-shuffle verified: 17/17 tasks done, 592/0/0 tests, all checks pass. Next: SuperCollider voice example.
008-supercollider-voice-example: 4 user stories, 11 FRs, 5 SCs, 0 clarifications. Spec at specs/008-supercollider-voice-example/spec.md

008-supercollider-voice-example: 4 phases, 3 new files (rekriate_sub.scd, test_osc_roundtrip.lua, supercollider-setup.md), 5 research decisions. Constitution PASS. Plan at specs/008-supercollider-voice-example/plan.md

008-supercollider-voice-example: 8 tasks across 6 phases (US1: 2 tasks, US2: 1, US3: 1 [P], US4: 1 [P], setup: 1, polish: 2). No TDD (Principle III N/A). 1 swarm block with 3 workers (rekriate_sub.scd, docs, test script). All 11 FRs and 5 SCs mapped. Tasks at specs/008-supercollider-voice-example/tasks.md

008-supercollider-voice-example: CLEAN — 0 CRITICAL, 1 MEDIUM (I1: US4-AS2 untestable over UDP — advisory, implementer should follow plan approach), 2 LOW (I2: terminology drift, C1: edge cases implicit). 100% requirement coverage (16/16). Constitution: all 5 principles PASS (III N/A). 8 tasks, 3 parallel workers ready. Safe to implement.
008-supercollider-voice-example: T001-T007 complete, all 3 deliverables exist. Only T008 (final verification) remains — confirm all 11 FRs, 5 SCs met, SC-005 holds, files syntactically valid.

008-supercollider-voice-example: T008 final verification PASS. All 11 FRs, 5 SCs confirmed. 3 deliverables valid (rekriate_sub.scd, test_osc_roundtrip.lua, supercollider-setup.md). SC-005 holds — no existing files modified. Full test suite 592/0/0.

008-supercollider-voice-example: ALL CHECKS PASS. 8/8 tasks done. Lua syntax clean, test suite 592/0/0, SC-005 holds. 3 deliverables verified (rekriate_sub.scd, test_osc_roundtrip.lua, supercollider-setup.md). Feature marked [x]. No features remain in queue — specifier should emit LOOP_COMPLETE.
All 7 features done: quality-hardening, simulated-grid, osc-voice, norns-entrypoint, pattern-bank-ui, swing-shuffle, supercollider-voice-example. 592 tests passing. Feature queue empty.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 18
- Duration: 53m 39s
- Exit code: 0
